title: xanthophyllum reflexum
intro: Xanthophyllum reflexum is a species of plant in the family Polygalaceae, commonly known as the xanthophyllum plant, which is native to tropical regions of Asia. The plant is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly in traditional medicine, where it is used to treat various health conditions such as fever, rheumatism, and digestive issues. The health benefits of Xanthophyllum reflexum include its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, which can help alleviate symptoms of infections and reduce inflammation in the body. In herbal preparations, the plant is often made into a decoction or infusion, and it can be used as a tea or tincture to harness its medicinal properties and promote overall well-being.
